No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to eradicating poverty.

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to ending hunger.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to health and well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fosters language skills (4.4) and cultural understanding (4.7) of Spanish-speaking countries, promoting global citizenship.
